name: PT Mitrabara Adiperdana Tbk
summary: PT Mitrabara Adiperdana Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in coal mining, trading, and industrial businesses. It holds interests in coal mines, which cover a total area of 2,960 hectares located in Malinau Regency, North Kalimantan. The company also operates biomass power plants; and provides plantation and forestry services. It sells its products in South Korea, China, the Philippines, Indonesia, Malaysia, New Zealand, Vietnam, Hongkong, Japan, and internationally. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT Mitrabara Adiperdana Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Wahana Sentosa Cemerlang.
